partials.name: Signup Info Partial A
partials.html_content:
Get your first tracked batch in under 20 minutes.

Never lose recipe history, never miss critical ingredients, and stop guessing your true costs.

  • Set up fast: import and log your first workflow quickly.
  • Track with confidence: preserve batch and recipe history.
  • Reduce waste: prevent avoidable ingredient mistakes.

partials.name: Signup Info Partial B
partials.html_content:
Start risk-free and see value before your next production run.

Choose the tier that fits today, then upgrade as your operation grows.

  • Low friction: start now and expand later.
  • Better decisions: connect ingredients, batches, and costs.
  • Built for makers: practical tools without clutter.
